excerpt: naming of ʿAlī as 'the legatee (waṣīy) and the minister (wazīr)' of the Prophet — a doctrine elaborated systematically by al-Qāḍī al-Nuʿmān in the chapter on walāya
source_authority: Fatimid chief qāḍī under al-Muʿizz li-Dīn Allāh
source_location_hint: Vol. 1, Kitāb al-Walāya (the first of the seven pillars)

excerpt: الحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي لَا يَبْلُغُ مِدْحَتَهُ الْقَائِلُونَ، وَلَا يُحْصِي نَعْمَاءَهُ الْعَادُّونَ، وَلَا يُؤَدِّي حَقَّهُ الْمُجْتَهِدُونَ
source_author: Imām ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib (compiled by al-Sharīf al-Raḍī)
source_authority: first Imām, Commander of the Faithful

excerpt: the Originator brings forth (ibdāʿ) the First Intellect from nothing at all, neither from matter nor from prior potency
source_location_hint: Yanbūʿ on al-ibdāʿ and the procession of the First Originated

excerpt: each ḥadd ʿālī and ḥadd dānī, among the Munbaʿithūn and below, occupies precisely the station that the wisdom of the Originator has assigned
source_authority: Ḥujjat al-ʿIrāqayn under al-Ḥākim bi-Amr Allāh
source_location_hint: On the hierarchy of the ḥudūd (cosmic and ecclesial limits)
